'''ân-z-r''' ('''kanazar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quarterize|quarterize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-z-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quarterize|quarterize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-z-r
|-
! Lemma
| kanazar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinazar|thinazar]] || [[word:jinazar|jinazar]] || [[word:shinazar|shinazar]] || [[word:kinazar|kinazar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunazar|thuthunazar]] || [[word:jujunazar|jujunazar]] || [[word:shushunazar|shushunazar]] || [[word:kukunazar|kukunazar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunazar|thunazar]] || [[word:junazar|junazar]] || [[word:shunazar|shunazar]] || [[word:kunazar|kunazar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunazar|thunazar]] || [[word:junazar|junazar]] || [[word:shunazar|shunazar]] || [[word:kunazar|kunazar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenazar|thenazar]] || [[word:jenazar|jenazar]] || [[word:shenazar|shenazar]] || [[word:kenazar|kenazar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonazar|thothonazar]] || [[word:jojonazar|jojonazar]] || [[word:shoshonazar|shoshonazar]] || [[word:kokonazar|kokonazar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonazar|thonazar]] || [[word:jonazar|jonazar]] || [[word:shonazar|shonazar]] || [[word:konazar|konazar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonazar|thonazar]] || [[word:jonazar|jonazar]] || [[word:shonazar|shonazar]] || [[word:konazar|konazar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnazar|thĂŠnazar]] || [[word:jĂŠnazar|jĂŠnazar]] || [[word:shĂŠnazar|shĂŠnazar]] || [[word:kĂŠnazar|kĂŠnazar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanazar|thathanazar]] || [[word:jajanazar|jajanazar]] || [[word:shashanazar|shashanazar]] || [[word:kakanazar|kakanazar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanazar|thanazar]] || [[word:janazar|janazar]] || [[word:shanazar|shanazar]] || [[word:kanazar|kanazar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanazar|thanazar]] || [[word:janazar|janazar]] || [[word:shanazar|shanazar]] || [[word:kanazar|kanazar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanazar|shanazar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanazar|goshanazar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanazar|gokishanazar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanazarnĂŒ|shanazarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanazarnknĂŒ|goshanazarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazarnĂŒ|gokishanazarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanazarshĂ«|shanazarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanazarnkshĂ«|goshanazarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanazarshĂ«|gokishanazarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazaro|shanazaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazarnkro|goshanazarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazaro|gokishanazaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazarmu|shanazarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazarnkmu|goshanazarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazarmu|gokishanazarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanazarsher|shanazarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanazarnksher|goshanazarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanazarsher|gokishanazarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanazarng|shanazarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanazarnkng|goshanazarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanazarng|gokishanazarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanazarya|shanazarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanazarnkya|goshanazarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanazarya|gokishanazarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanazaryam|shanazaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanazarnkyam|goshanazarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanazaryam|gokishanazaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanazarnĂŒshĂ«|shanazarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanazarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanazarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanazarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanazarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazarnĂŒro|shanazarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazarnknĂŒro|goshanazarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazarnĂŒro|gokishanazarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazarnĂŒmu|shanazarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazarnknĂŒmu|goshanazarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazarnĂŒmu|gokishanazarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanazarshĂ«nĂŒ|shanazarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanazarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanazarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanazarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazarshĂ«ro|shanazarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazarnkshĂ«ro|goshanazarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazarshĂ«ro|gokishanazarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazarshĂ«mu|shanazarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazarnkshĂ«mu|goshanazarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazarshĂ«mu|gokishanazarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanazaronĂŒ|shanazaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanazarnkronĂŒ|goshanazarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazaronĂŒ|gokishanazaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanazaroshĂ«|shanazaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanazarnkroshĂ«|goshanazarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanazaroshĂ«|gokishanazaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazaromu|shanazaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazarnkromu|goshanazarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazaromu|gokishanazaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanazarmunĂŒ|shanazarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanazarnkmunĂŒ|goshanazarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazarmunĂŒ|gokishanazarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanazarmushĂ«|shanazarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanazarnkmushĂ«|goshanazarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanazarmushĂ«|gokishanazarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazarmuro|shanazarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazarnkmuro|goshanazarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazarmuro|gokishanazarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
